headline: Regional sports networks are faltering even as ratings soar
summary: A group of regional sports networks is set to wind down, marking the demise of a once-lucrative business that's faced significant pressure.

raw.headline: Regional sports networks are faltering even as ratings soar

headline: Charter Shareholder Vote Puts Political Spending And Governance Under Scrutiny
summary: Charter Communications shareholders are set to vote on a new political expenditures report proposal at the upcoming annual meeting. An exempt solicitation statement has been filed ahead of the vote, highlighting investor attention on the company’s political spending transparency. The outcome could influence Charter’s governance policies and its approach to addressing stakeholder concerns on corporate responsibility. Charter Communications, listed as NasdaqGS:CHTR, is drawing investor focus...

headline: What You Need to Know Ahead of Charter Communications’ Earnings Release
summary: Charter Communications is gearing up to report its first-quarter results this month, and analysts expect a robust double-digit jump in earnings.

headline: A Look At Charter Communications (CHTR) Valuation As Revenue And Broadband Headwinds Intensify
summary: Charter Communications (CHTR) has become a focus for investors after projecting Q1 revenue and EBITDA declines, along with expected broadband subscriber losses of about 98,000, and around 400,000 forecast for 2026. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. The latest guidance on softer Q1 revenue and EBITDA, together with forecast broadband subscriber losses, comes after a tough stretch for holders. The 1 year total shareholder return shows a 42.98% decline and the 5 year total...
